evals.prompt: Convert the markdown file test-input/sample.md to an HTML file with VS Code documentation styling. Save the output to test-output/eval1-output.html
evals.expected_output: A valid HTML file with embedded VS Code CSS styling, containing properly converted markdown elements (headings, code blocks, lists, tables, links)

evals.prompt: Create a simple markdown file with a heading, a paragraph, and a code block. Then convert it to HTML using the skill.
evals.expected_output: HTML file with proper VS Code styling that includes h1, p, and pre/code elements

evals.prompt: Convert all markdown files in the test-input directory to HTML files in test-output/batch/ directory using batch conversion
evals.expected_output: All .md files converted to .html files with proper VS Code styling
